body:
Vantage Loop Product Wiki

Home for the Growth & Analytics pod. Start here for Northstar program docs, launch planning, and instrumentation specs. Owners: Stephanie Wells (PM), Megan Shaw (Eng), Tomoko Hayashi (Design), Ryan Iyer (Data Science).
title: Vantage Loop Product Wiki

body:
Northstar — Program Hub

Northstar is our enterprise analytics dashboard. Feature freeze 2026-10-09, target GA ship 2026-11-13. Currently in beta with 3 pilot customers. This hub links the PRD, the north-star metric spec, the GA launch plan, and the pilot program.

  • PRD & scope
  • North-star metric definition
  • GA launch & comms
  • Pilot program & feedback
title: Northstar — Program Hub

body:
Northstar PRD

Problem

Enterprise admins can't see cross-team adoption and retention in one place; they stitch exports together manually. Northstar gives a single, governed analytics surface.

Goals

  • Time-to-first-insight under 5 minutes for a new admin.
  • Self-serve cohort & retention views without a data team.
  • Role-based sharing for exec readouts.

Non-goals (GA)

  • Custom SQL editor (post-GA).
  • Mobile authoring (companion app is read-only v1).

Scope

Dashboard builder, prebuilt retention/funnel templates, scheduled email digests, RBAC. Eng lead Megan Shaw; design Tomoko Hayashi; instrumentation Ryan Iyer.
title: Northstar PRD

body:
North-Star Metric Spec

Primary metric: Weekly Activated Accounts = accounts with ≥1 admin building a saved view AND ≥3 viewers opening it within 7 days. Input metrics: time-to-first-insight, saved-view creation rate, digest open rate. Counter-metric: dashboard load p95 < 2.5s. Owner: Ryan Iyer; reviewed weekly with Stephanie Wells.
title: North-Star Metric Spec

body:
Northstar GA Launch Plan

Key dates

  • Feature freeze: 2026-10-09
  • Release candidate QA: 2026-11-03
  • GA ship: 2026-11-13

Workstreams

  • Eng readiness (Megan Shaw): RC, regression, rollback plan.
  • Launch comms (Stephanie Wells + marketing): blog, in-app, pilot upgrade path.
  • CS enablement (Aisha Bello): playbooks, migration guide.

Risks

  • Pilot blockers from Brightwave/Cobalt still open.
  • Enterprise reporting module dependency.
title: Northstar GA Launch Plan

body:
Pilot Program Charter

Three design-partner pilots: Brightwave Analytics, Meridian Logistics, Cobalt Health. Cadence: biweekly feedback sessions, shared Typeform survey each cycle, success criteria tied to Weekly Activated Accounts. Exec sponsor: Carlos Rivera. PM: Stephanie Wells.
title: Pilot Program Charter

body:
Pilot Feedback Synthesis — Q1

Themes from the first feedback cycles: (1) onboarding empty states confuse first-time admins, (2) digest scheduling is a top request, (3) RBAC granularity needed for Cobalt's compliance review. Action items routed to Tomoko (onboarding) and Megan (RBAC). Source: Typeform pilot survey responses.
title: Pilot Feedback Synthesis — Q1

body:
Enterprise Reporting Module — Tech Spec

Server-side aggregation layer feeding Northstar dashboards. Materialized cohort tables refreshed hourly; query budget p95 < 800ms. Auth via existing RBAC service. Owner: Megan Shaw. Dependency for GA reporting templates.
title: Enterprise Reporting Module — Tech Spec

body:
Event Taxonomy & Instrumentation

Standardized Amplitude event names for Northstar: view_created, view_shared, digest_opened, insight_first_seen. Naming convention object_action, snake_case. Migration from legacy events completed in Q1. Owner: Ryan Iyer.
title: Event Taxonomy & Instrumentation

body:
Retention Dashboard — Design Notes

Default cohort view: weekly retention curve with comparison overlay. Empty state shows a data-free guided setup (nothing fabricated). Tomoko's Figma covers the builder, filters, and the share modal. Cross-referenced with the Figma Northstar design reviews.
title: Retention Dashboard — Design Notes

body:
GA Scope Cut — Decision Log

Decisions to hit the 2026-11-13 ship date: custom SQL editor deferred to post-GA; mobile companion ships read-only; digest scheduling stays in scope (top pilot ask). Approver: Carlos Rivera. Logged by Stephanie Wells.
title: GA Scope Cut — Decision Log

body:
Growth Experiment Framework

Lightweight experiment intake: hypothesis, metric, MDE, guardrails, rollback. Reviewed in Tuesday growth sync. Keeps experiments tied to the north-star metric rather than vanity numbers.
title: Growth Experiment Framework

body:
Onboarding Funnel Teardown

Drop-off concentrated between signup and first saved view. Proposed fixes: guided setup, data-free empty states, contextual tooltips. Tracking against signup→activation funnel in Amplitude. Owner: Stephanie Wells.
title: Onboarding Funnel Teardown

body:
Stephanie — Personal Notes

Private drafts: mentoring prep, conference talk outlines, reading notes. Not for the team wiki.
title: Stephanie — Personal Notes

body:
PM Mentorship Program — Outline

Biweekly sessions for early-career PMs (focus on women in product). Structure: goal-setting, artifact review, prioritization exercises, career mapping. Reading list anchored on "Shipping Great Products" by Kenji Ota.
title: PM Mentorship Program — Outline

body:
Launch Comms Draft

GA announcement copy: positioning ("governed analytics without a data team"), pilot quotes pending approval, in-app upgrade banner, blog post outline. Hand-off to marketing after the 2026-10-09 freeze.
title: Launch Comms Draft

body:
Northstar Spec Library — Index

Single landing page for every Northstar spec: PRDs, metric definitions, tech specs, and design notes. Use this index instead of searching the space. Each entry links to its owner and current version. Curated by Stephanie Wells; contributions from Megan Shaw, Tomoko Hayashi, and Ryan Iyer.
title: Northstar Spec Library — Index

body:
Northstar — Weekly Status

Rolling status for the Northstar program. This week: RBAC granularity scoped to roles for GA, onboarding empty states shipped to beta, digest scheduling in code review. Blockers: Cobalt compliance sign-off, reporting module load test. Updated each Monday by Stephanie Wells ahead of the growth sync.

  • On track: launch comms draft
  • At risk: enterprise reporting dependency
  • Done this week: onboarding teardown fixes
title: Northstar — Weekly Status

body:
Scheduled Digests PRD

Problem

Admins want Northstar insights pushed to their inbox without logging in daily. Today there is no way to subscribe a team to a saved view on a cadence.

Goals

  • Weekly and daily email digests for any saved view.
  • Per-recipient timezone and quiet hours.
  • One-click unsubscribe and digest preview.

Non-goals (GA)

  • Slack and Teams delivery (fast-follow).
  • Custom HTML templates.

Scope

Digest scheduler, render service, delivery queue, open-rate tracking. Eng lead Megan Shaw; design Tomoko Hayashi; instrumentation Ryan Iyer. Top ask from the pilot program.
title: Scheduled Digests PRD

body:
Retention Metric Spec

Secondary metric: Week-4 Account Retention = share of activated accounts with ≥1 admin returning to build or edit a view in their fourth week. Input metrics: digest open rate, saved-view edit rate, viewer return rate. Counter-metric: notification opt-out rate < 8%. Owner: Ryan Iyer; reviewed biweekly with Stephanie Wells in the growth sync.
title: Retention Metric Spec
